Taf^or Ti^cr fcfa if w«fr TT JTr^rq- (1) «nfr ttfmw tigrr if to»?^f ?t ?f^r sfrfwr £ ?rfVf?rq- sfrfiTTir tft V6*t wf$s toiler? ^r ^ r ^fm-1 ^ 6 -- 1 of 2 -- • • * « * THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] is) sfrHi^af srcr sTF?r irfVnn snrfufJra* ^?r SRT 7^ % [ff. «ft\ 22011/2/!)2 - Si ^"r ^] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIEICATION New Delhi, the 6th February, 1992 G.S.R. 87(JE).—In exercise 01 the powers con- fcned by section 23 of the Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 (6 of 1991), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Public Liability Insurance Rules, 1991, aamely :— 1. (1) These rules iray be called the Public Liability Insurance (Amendment) Rules, 1992. (2) They shall come into force on the date of of their publication in- the Official Gazette. 2. In the Public Liability Insurance Rules, 1991, after ruies 9 the following rules shall be inserted, namely : "10. Extent of liability (!) Subject to the provisions of sub-section (2A) of section 4 of the Act., the maximum aggregate liability of the insurer to pay relief under' an award to the several claimant's arising out of an accident snail not exceed rupees five crores and in case of »ore than one accident during the currency of the policy or one year, whichever is less, shall not exceed rupees fifteen crores in the aggregate. (2) in awarding relief under the Act', the Collector shall ensure thai the insurers maximum liability under the Insurance Policy does not exceed ths limits stipulated in sub-rule (1). (3) Any award for relief which exceeds (he amount payable under the insurance Policy shall be met from the ..Relief Fund and in case the award ex- ceeds the total of the amount of insurance and the Relief Fund, the amount which fall?, short of such sum payable shall be met by the owner. 11. Contribution of owner to the Environmental ', i<e.hef Fund. (1) An owner shall contribute to ihe Environmen- tal Relief Fund a sum equal.to the premium payable to the insurer. (2) Every contribution to ;.he Environmental Re- lief Fund under sub-rule (1) shall be payable to the insurer, together with the amount of premium. (3) The contribution receiving by ihe insurer shall be remitted as per the scheme under section 7A of the Act." [No. P. 22011j2|92-CPA] MUKUL SANWAL, Jt. Secy. FOOTNOTE : The Principal Rules were publish^ in the Gazette of India Vide No'iftcaflon S.O. 330(E) dated 1st May, 3 991 and subsequently amended by Notification No. G.3.R. 596(E) dated'the 20th Sep- tember. 199.1. —. 1 r •' Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Rftig Road, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the-.
